title: How LLMs Actually Work
summary: Under the hood, a large language model mainly does one thing: predict the next token. Learn how that loop, repeated quickly, produces essays, answers, and code.

context.headline: One trick, repeated a thousand times
context.description: Every chatbot answer is built through the same core loop: your prompt goes in, the model predicts a likely next token, adds it to the text, and repeats. Understanding this loop and the terms around it explains much of how modern language models behave.
context.when: The engine behind every modern chatbot
